data.summary: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement for pre-filling from previous submissions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Pre-fill from previous submissions' but did not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for pre-filling but lacks specific evidence demonstrating that this feature is implemented or functioning as required. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of direct evidence supporting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of pre-fill functionality from previous submissions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the pre-fill functionality.
